compliance_note: ships only when the EOI phase is active; re-clear against live conditions. Non-binding expression of interest only. No payment, no commitment, no allocation, no priority, no minimum. Verbatim CSF warning retained. Re-run the full compliance battery against live offer conditions before this phase goes live.
angle: Recursion punch (EOI: eight years for other founders, now ours, indicate interest)
hook_type: Cadence numbers + 'for other founders' recursion gap (interest-only frame)
tactic: Proof cadence with recursion bound -> name the raise -> non-binding interest ask
motivation: Curiosity + recursion + this-is-a-real-raise clarity + low-friction signal
primary_text:
324 raises and $234M+ for other founders since 2018. Now indicate your interest in ours.

For eight years our platform helped 137,000 Australians own a piece of companies like Naked Life and Medigrowth. We stayed private the whole time. Now we are opening our own Crowd-Sourced Funding raise.

Telling us is non-binding. No payment, no commitment, and you decide nothing until you read the offer document.

Indicate your interest. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Eight years for others. Now our own raise.
description: Non-binding. No payment, no commitment. Indicate your interest.
_source_label: DRC V5 -- E6 Recursion punch (EOI, first-timers, phase-gated)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V5-W8 recursion angle, re-framed for the EOI phase regime.
_v5_rationale: Recursion-as-community spine in interest-only form. 'for other founders ... Now indicate your interest in ours' is the explicit recursion that answers the client's 'doesn't read like a raise' note while staying non-binding.

Hook rewrite from the original scratch draft (which opened '8 years.' and scored Halbert 3): now '324 raises and $234M+ for other founders since 2018. Now indicate your interest in ours.' Halbert 5/5 in --primary-text mode (cadence + recursion gap).
'We stayed private the whole time' confessional beat retained. EOI language: 'Telling us is non-binding. No payment, no commitment'. No allocation/priority/minimum/preferential.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors, EOI phase.
_a_pile_signals: recursion gap (now indicate your interest in ours)
_compliance_findings_resolved: EOI regime: 'Telling us is non-binding', 'No payment, no commitment', 'indicate your interest'. Allowed EOI language only.

STILL HARD-BLOCK clear: no 'first in line', no priority access/allocation, no 'secure/reserve your allocation/place/spot in the raise', no 'shares allocated to early registrants', no minimum, no 'same terms as institutional/insiders', no 'be first in the queue'. Zero matches.
BANNED-CSF-PHRASES (waitlist set): zero matches. No 'invest/buy/subscribe now'.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
BRAND-EXCLUDED: only verified-good raises (Naked Life RAISE-001, Medigrowth RAISE-003).
Subject discipline: 'Birchal' appears zero times in body; 'our platform' / first-person we/our; recursion referents explicit (other founders vs us).
Number traceability: 324=PLAT-001, $234M+=PLAT-002, 2018/eight years=PLAT-004, 137,000=PLAT-003, brands=RAISE-001/003. No market-share / #1 / first claim.
